attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who excels in sustained high-speed efforts rather than explosive attacks. Proven ability to finish hard tempo-based stages where power endurance trumps pure acceleration.
team_tactics: Sunweb allows him freedom to join breakaways in stages unsuited to pure sprinters. Benefits from teammates like Cavania setting brutal early pace that fragments peloton and discourages chase organization.
terrain_preference: Fast, technical courses requiring sustained power output over 45+ km/h. Time trial background gives advantage on rolling terrain with tempo-based selection rather than steep punchy climbs.
vulnerability: Limited observations suggest potential weakness in explosive uphill finishes or situations requiring repeated accelerations. Relies on breakaway opportunities rather than creating separation from strong groups.
key_patterns: Wins from breakaways after exceptionally fast opening hours that discourage peloton chase efforts
Demonstrates repeatable success pattern: identical stage win formula executed successfully twice at Tour
Time trial engine (48km/h TT speed) translates to breakaway endurance in road stages
Overperforms expectations in Grand Tours, suggesting strong three-week racing adaptation
form_trajectory: positive: progression from first pro TT win (March) to double Tour stage wins (September) shows rising trajectory and consistency throughout 2020 season
